Off Calendar Aug-05-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF AUSTIN PACE'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Granting Leave To File Amended Complaint

PLAINTIFF AUSTIN PACE'S Motion For Order Granting Leave To File Amended Complaint.

Grant. No opposition filed.
